title: chrysosplenium aulacocarpum
intro: Chrysosplenium aulacocarpum, also known as Chinese golden saxifrage, is a plant species belonging to the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae). The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Consuming Chrysosplenium aulacocarpum is believed to have health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
